description: Built AI workflow screens, onboarding, resume tooling, and dashboard flows that help candidates move through applications with less friction.
Lead frontend delivery across product UI, implementation quality, and scalable interface patterns for a growing product team.
Shipped admin workflows for onboarding, document review, workforce data, and reporting so HR teams could manage operations with more confidence.
Build websites, dashboards, API-backed interfaces, and performance-focused frontend experiences for founders and small teams.
Improved marketplace speed, SEO, and responsive UI while helping move the product from legacy React patterns into a stronger Next.js experience.
